endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.MachineLearningServices/operations
endpoints.description: Lists all of the available Azure Machine Learning Workspaces REST API operations.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.MachineLearningServices/locations/{location}/Quotas
endpoints.description: Gets the currently assigned Workspace Quotas based on VMFamily.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.MachineLearningServices/locations/{location}/updateQuotas
endpoints.description: Update quota for each VM family in workspace.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.MachineLearningServices/locations/{location}/usages
endpoints.description: Gets the current usage information as well as limits for AML resources for given subscription and location.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.MachineLearningServices/locations/{location}/vmSizes
endpoints.description: Returns supported VM Sizes in a location
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.MachineLearningServices/workspaces
endpoints.description: Lists all the available machine learning workspaces under the specified subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.MachineLearningServices/workspaces/skus
endpoints.description: Lists all skus with associated features
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.MachineLearningServices/workspaces
endpoints.description: Lists all the available machine learning workspaces under the specified resource group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.MachineLearningServices/workspaces/{workspaceName}
endpoints.description: Gets the properties of the specified machine learning workspace.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{WORKSPACENAME}} with a real workspacename.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.MachineLearningServices/workspaces/{workspaceName}
endpoints.description: Creates or updates a workspace with the specified parameters.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{WORKSPACENAME}} with a real workspacename.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.MachineLearningServices/workspaces/{workspaceName}
endpoints.description: Deletes a machine learning workspace.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{WORKSPACENAME}} with a real workspacename.

endpoints.name: PATCH /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.MachineLearningServices/workspaces/{workspaceName}
endpoints.description: Updates a machine learning workspace with the specified parameters.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{WORKSPACENAME}} with a real workspacename.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.MachineLearningServices/workspaces/{workspaceName}/computes
endpoints.description: Gets computes in specified workspace.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{WORKSPACENAME}} with a real workspacename.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.MachineLearningServices/workspaces/{workspaceName}/computes/{computeName}
endpoints.description: Gets compute definition by its name. Any secrets (storage keys, service credentials, etc) are not returned - use 'keys' nested resource to get them.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{COMPUTENAME}} with a real computename. Replace {{WORKSPACENAME}} with a real workspacename.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.MachineLearningServices/workspaces/{workspaceName}/computes/{computeName}
endpoints.description: Creates or updates compute. This call will overwrite a compute if it exists. This is a nonrecoverable operation. If your intent is to create a new compute, do a GET first to verify that it does not exist yet.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{COMPUTENAME}} with a real computename. Replace {{WORKSPACENAME}} with a real workspacename.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.MachineLearningServices/workspaces/{workspaceName}/computes/{computeName}
endpoints.description: Deletes specified Machine Learning compute.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{COMPUTENAME}} with a real computename. Replace {{WORKSPACENAME}} with a real workspacename.

endpoints.name: PATCH /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.MachineLearningServices/workspaces/{workspaceName}/computes/{computeName}
endpoints.description: Updates properties of a compute. This call will overwrite a compute if it exists. This is a nonrecoverable operation.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{COMPUTENAME}} with a real computename. Replace {{WORKSPACENAME}} with a real workspacename.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.MachineLearningServices/workspaces/{workspaceName}/computes/{computeName}/listKeys
endpoints.description: Gets secrets related to Machine Learning compute (storage keys, service credentials, etc).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{COMPUTENAME}} with a real computename. Replace {{WORKSPACENAME}} with a real workspacename.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.MachineLearningServices/workspaces/{workspaceName}/computes/{computeName}/listNodes
endpoints.description: Get the details (e.g IP address, port etc) of all the compute nodes in the compute.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{COMPUTENAME}} with a real computename. Replace {{WORKSPACENAME}} with a real workspacename.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.MachineLearningServices/workspaces/{workspaceName}/features
endpoints.description: Lists all enabled features for a workspace
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{WORKSPACENAME}} with a real workspacename.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.MachineLearningServices/workspaces/{workspaceName}/listKeys
endpoints.description: Lists all the keys associated with this workspace. This includes keys for the storage account, app insights and password for container registry
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{WORKSPACENAME}} with a real workspacename.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.MachineLearningServices/workspaces/{workspaceName}/privateEndpointConnections/{privateEndpointConnectionName}
endpoints.description: Gets the specified private endpoint connection associated with the workspace.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{PRIVATEENDPOINTCONNECTIONNAME}} with a real privateendpointconnectionname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{WORKSPACENAME}} with a real workspacename.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.MachineLearningServices/workspaces/{workspaceName}/privateEndpointConnections/{privateEndpointConnectionName}
endpoints.description: Update the state of specified private endpoint connection associated with the workspace.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{PRIVATEENDPOINTCONNECTIONNAME}} with a real privateendpointconnectionname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{WORKSPACENAME}} with a real workspacename.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.MachineLearningServices/workspaces/{workspaceName}/privateEndpointConnections/{privateEndpointConnectionName}
endpoints.description: Deletes the specified private endpoint connection associated with the workspace.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{PRIVATEENDPOINTCONNECTIONNAME}} with a real privateendpointconnectionname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{WORKSPACENAME}} with a real workspacename.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.MachineLearningServices/workspaces/{workspaceName}/privateLinkResources
endpoints.description: Gets the private link resources that need to be created for a workspace.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{WORKSPACENAME}} with a real workspacename.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.MachineLearningServices/workspaces/{workspaceName}/resyncKeys
endpoints.description: Resync all the keys associated with this workspace. This includes keys for the storage account, app insights and password for container registry
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{WORKSPACENAME}} with a real workspacename.
